2010Conceptual Art

Axel King

The artist who never existed—fame manufactured by the crowd

A conceptual project that created a virtual artist named Axel King, assembling fame and authorship through crowdsourced participation. The work stages the cult of the superstar while exposing how networks can manufacture artistic identity and distribute creativity across a crowd.

In-Depth Art StatementView Live Project

Leroy Brothers

Contemporary art collective interrogating identity, technology, and the mechanisms of the art world since 1997.
